backend/core/contracts/insight_graph_v1.py lines 34-43: BiomarkerNode has biomarker_id, status, score only; line 38 PRD §4.7 note explicitly states 'No raw values, units, or reference ranges. Only interpreted outputs.' — intentional design

backend/core/analytics/snapshot_linker.py lines 60-78: _nodes_from_biomarkers_payload() reads biomarker_name/status/score from result.biomarkers payload only — 'value' and 'unit' keys present in payload are silently discarded
backend/core/analytics/state_transition_engine.py line 95: build_state_transition_v1() operates on BiomarkerNode.status and .score only across all 189 lines — no raw value access anywhere

backend/core/contracts/state_transition_v1.py lines 29-38: BiomarkerTransitionNode has biomarker_id, from_status, to_status, transition, evidence_codes only; line 50: canonical_json_sha256 hashes t.model_dump() for each transition node

backend/core/dto/builders.py lines 97-98: analysis_route_biomarker_row() persists 'value' and 'unit' alongside status/score in result.biomarkers — raw values ARE in DB, just not reconstructed in snapshot path

snapshot_linker.py:60-78 discards 'value'/'unit' from payload; architecture doc §7.1 independently confirms: 'snapshot_linker.py currently preserves only safe status/score metadata from fallback biomarker rows'

SSOT has two separate registries (biomarkers.yaml, lifestyle_registry.yaml) with distinct domains and no overlap. No duplicate narrative authority source detected in docs/golden-narrative/ or backend/core/contracts/.
builders.py:97-98 confirms raw values ARE persisted in result.biomarkers via analysis_route_biomarker_row(). Gap is in reconstruction path (snapshot_linker.py:60-78) only.
Only snapshot_linker.py reconstruction path + BiomarkerTransitionNode extension required. No DB schema changes, no new persistence tables needed.

BiomarkerTransitionNode consumers: state_transition_engine.py and test_state_transition_engine.py. Extension with optional None-default fields (prior_value, current_value, unit) is backward-safe for both consumers.

N-2 architecture doc §8 explicitly authorises N-3 to settle this decision. Extending BiomarkerTransitionNode is the minimum viable path — it does not violate PRD §4.7 (which governs BiomarkerNode, not BiomarkerTransitionNode). No additional architectural adjudication needed.

Expected touch set bounded to: backend/core/contracts/state_transition_v1.py, backend/core/analytics/snapshot_linker.py, backend/core/analytics/state_transition_engine.py (minor value-threading), backend/tests/. No expansion beyond contract/snapshot/transition layer.
N-2 architecture §7.1 correctly predicted the gap. All repo evidence (snapshot_linker.py:60-78, BiomarkerNode:34-43, state_transition_v1.py:29-38) aligns with N-2 assumptions.

state_transition_v1.py:50-53: canonical_json_sha256 hashes t.model_dump() for each BiomarkerTransitionNode. Adding optional None-default fields will change model_dump() output and break state_transition_hash for existing analyses. Cursor MUST bump STATE_TRANSITION_V1_VERSION (preferred: signals explicit schema change, preserves auditability) OR use model_dump(exclude_none=True) in hash computation. Must be resolved before implementing; not a STOP — a mandatory design decision.

Prior analyses stored before N-3 will not have value/unit in their embedded insight_graph snapshot (snapshot_linker.py:81-108 path reconstructs from stored data that predates N-3). New fields will be None for old snapshots. Sprint must handle gracefully — None is valid, sprint must not STOP or error on missing prior values.

Scope: (1) extend BiomarkerTransitionNode with optional prior_value/current_value/unit; (2) update snapshot_linker reconstruction to extract value/unit; (3) thread raw values through state_transition_engine; (4) add regression tests. No narrative prose compilation in scope. MIXED classification correct: contract layer (CONTENT) + analytical pipeline threading (BEHAVIOUR).

Existing: backend/tests/unit/test_state_transition_engine.py (hash determinism + transition rules), backend/tests/enforcement/test_state_transition_not_hardcoded.py. Gap: NO existing tests for snapshot_linker.py — new tests must be added by sprint.

Prompt explicitly excludes narrative prose compilation, frontend, lifestyle joins, phenotype/IDL entities, report compiler redesign. Design rules 1-6 in prompt bound the implementation. Sprint is a contract-enabling sprint only.
No .codex/, .vscode/, AGENTS.md references in prompt or expected touch set. No control-plane scripts in scope.

Current branch is 'main'. Prompt requires branch 'feature/n-3-longitudinal-contract-upgrade'. Cursor must create or checkout this branch before running run_work_package.py start. Not a hardening blocker.
